/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pengy_chatview_markdown_test.dir/pengy_chatview_markdown_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy_chatview_markdown_test.dir/tests/test_chatview_markdown.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pengy_chatview_markdown_test.dir/chatview.cpp.o -o pengy_chatview_markdown_test -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
